'''natodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sialyl|sialyl]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-t-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sialyl|sialyl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| natodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nætedeth|nætedeth]] || [[word:nætedej|nætedej]] || [[word:nætedesh|nætedesh]] || [[word:nætede|nætede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:natotodoth|natotodoth]] || [[word:natotodoj|natotodoj]] || [[word:natotodosh|natotodosh]] || [[word:natotodo|natotodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:natodoth|natodoth]] || [[word:natodoj|natodoj]] || [[word:natodosh|natodosh]] || [[word:natodo|natodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:natofdofth|natofdofth]] || [[word:natofdofj|natofdofj]] || [[word:natofdofsh|natofdofsh]] || [[word:natofdof|natofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:natodotho|natodotho]] || [[word:natodojo|natodojo]] || [[word:natodosho|natodosho]] || [[word:natodoko|natodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:natodoth|natodoth]] || [[word:natodoj|natodoj]] || [[word:natodosh|natodosh]] || [[word:natodo|natodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:natodothol|natodothol]] || [[word:natodojol|natodojol]] || [[word:natodoshol|natodoshol]] || [[word:natodokol|natodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:natodoothotho|natodoothotho]] || [[word:natodoojojo|natodoojojo]] || [[word:natodooshosho|natodooshosho]] || [[word:natodooko|natodooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:natodothon|natodothon]] || [[word:natodojon|natodojon]] || [[word:natodoshon|natodoshon]] || [[word:natodokon|natodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:natodothooro|natodothooro]] || [[word:natodojooro|natodojooro]] || [[word:natodoshooro|natodoshooro]] || [[word:natodokooro|natodokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
